title: citronella macrocarpa
intro: Citronella macrocarpa, also known as lemongrass or Ceylon citronella, is a tropical grass native to India and Sri Lanka, characterized by its long, slender leaves and citrusy scent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of citronella macrocarpa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Citronella macrocarpa can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its benefits.
